.file-embed.background: rgb(25, 28, 34) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(25, 28, 34) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(18, 20, 24) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
.view-content.font-family: "??", "??", ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, #23272f 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#23272f, color-mix(in srgb, #23272f 65%, transparent))
body.--font-editor-theme: system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Inter, Ubuntu, sans-serif
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, #23272f 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#23272f, color-mix(in srgb, #23272f 65%, transparent))
body.background: rgb(18, 20, 24) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(18, 20, 24) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-selected.mod-complex.suggestion-i.background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(18, 20, 24) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-complex.suggestion-item.background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(18, 20, 24) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(18, 20, 24) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(18, 20, 24) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(25, 28, 34) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input.task-list-item-checkbox[data-line=.font-family: "??", "??", "??", ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgb(25, 28, 34) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(25, 28, 34) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgba(209, 154, 102, 0.3) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(25, 28, 34) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(25, 28, 34) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
